template_usage: chat route returns a 501 provider-boundary response when AI_PROVIDER_API_KEY is missing
dashboard provider card names the provider boundary and receipt
AI surfaces keep model output disabled until app-owned credentials exist
blocked_until_configured: persistent conversation storage if the app enables it
honesty_notes: This receipt is not live model streaming, model quality, billing, safety, or persistence proof.

No secret values are read into this receipt.
